items.title: Federal officers may have lied about shooting of migrant in Minneapolis, officials say
items.description: ICE chief Todd Lyons says the two officers were immediately placed on administrative leave.

items.title: Weston wins emphatic skeleton gold for first GB medal
items.description: Matt Weston cements his status as the best skeleton racer in the world as he makes history by winning Olympic gold in emphatic fashion in Cortina, sec...

items.title: Don Lemon pleads not guilty in Minnesota church protest case
items.description: The former CNN host and eight others have been charged for interrupting a church service to protest immigration raids in the state.

items.title: Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
items.description: The Britons had been part of a group of five people accompanied by an instructor, skiing off-piste in Val d'Isère.

items.title: 'Intense, aggressive, entertaining' - what will Tudor bring to Spurs ?
